message:
Command `# The filelist references .mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp which doesn't exist
# We need to create it pointing to verilog/rtl/
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
SOCGEN_TMP="$PROJECT_ROOT/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"

# Create the directory structure
mkdir -p "$SOCGEN_TMP/rtl"
mkdir -p "$SOCGEN_TMP/tb"

# Symlink or copy the RTL files
cp "$DESIGN_ROOT/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" "$SOCGEN_TMP/rtl/"
ls "$SOCGEN_TMP/rtl/"
echo "---"
# Copy the tb files too
cp "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/"*.v "$SOCGEN_TMP/tb/"
cp "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/"*.vh "$SOCGEN_TMP/tb/" 2>/dev/null || true
ls "$SOCGEN_TMP/tb/"` executed with exit code 0.
